tests.current_optimized_program:
declare void @use(i8)

define i1 @fold_lshr_power_of_2_minus_1_multi_use(i8 %x) {
  %lshr = lshr i8 15, %x
  call void @use(i8 %lshr)
  %trunc = trunc i8 %lshr to i1
  ret i1 %trunc
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:

define i1 @fold_lshr_power_of_2_minus_1_multi_use(i8 %x) {
  %lshr = lshr i8 15, %x
  call void @use(i8 %lshr)
  %trunc = icmp ult i8 %x, 4
  ret i1 %trunc
}

; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LSHR:%.*]] = lshr i8 15, [[X]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use(i8 [[LSHR]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TRUNC:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[X]], 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[TRUNC]]

  call void @use(i8 %lshr)
  %trunc = trunc i8 %lshr to i1
  ret i1 %trunc
}

comments.body: There are also generalizations beyond the pow2 pattern, for example this: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/Zr98JP

issue.title: [InstCombine] Missed optimization for trunc (Pow2 >> X) to i1
